about.title: Your Trusted Tire Supplier
about.subtitle: Wholesale tire importer and distributor based in Madrid
about.description: ImpNeuRec is a wholesale tire distributor specializing in connecting top manufacturers with workshops, fleets and distributors in Spain. As a tire importer with direct factory access in Europe and Asia, we offer competitive wholesale pricing and reliable supply across all categories.

quality.description: All our tires comply with European homologation regulations and the highest safety standards.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Tire supplier for workshops and distributors across Spain

t1.text: We've been buying wholesale tires from ImpNeuRec for over 5 years. Their brand catalog and delivery speed are key for our workshop. They always have stock in the sizes we need.
t1.author: Javier Manzanares

t2.text: As tire distributors in the Levante region, we need a reliable supplier with competitive prices. ImpNeuRec offers real wholesale conditions and exceptional customer service.
t2.author: Laura Gómez
t2.role: Purchasing Manager, Neumáticos Express Levante — Valencia

t3.text: For our transport fleet, cost per kilometer is fundamental. ImpNeuRec advises us on commercial fleet tires and their wholesale prices have helped us reduce costs by 15%.
t3.author: Miguel Ángel Torres

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about buying wholesale tires

q1.question: What is the minimum order for buying wholesale tires?
q1.answer: We work with minimum orders tailored to each client. Whether you're an independent workshop or a large distributor, we have flexible conditions. Contact our sales team for a personalized proposal based on your wholesale tire needs.

q2.question: What tire brands do you distribute?
q2.answer: We distribute over 50 tire brands, including premium European brands, mid-range and budget brands. Our catalog covers passenger, SUV, commercial and industrial tires to meet all your business needs.

q3.question: What are your tire delivery times?
q3.answer: We deliver within 24-48 hours for orders from our Madrid warehouse to anywhere on the Iberian Peninsula. For direct import orders, lead times range from 2-4 weeks depending on origin and volume.

q4.question: Do you offer commercial tires for transport fleets?
q4.answer: Yes, we specialize in commercial fleet tires. We offer tires for trucks, vans and commercial vehicles with wholesale pricing, long-term supply contracts and technical advice to optimize your fleet's cost per kilometer.

q5.question: How can I request a wholesale tire quote?
q5.answer: You can request a quote through the contact form on our website, by email at info@impneurec.com or by calling +34 672 92 86 86. Provide the sizes, quantities and tire type you need and you'll receive a proposal within 24 hours.

q6.question: Do you distribute tires outside Spain?
q6.answer: Yes, in addition to our main distribution in Spain, we export tires to Portugal, France and other European countries. We have international logistics and export experience to offer a complete B2B tire distribution service across Europe.
